name: canva-invite-manager
description: Secure invitation code system for Canva Education classes — powered by Cloudflare Workers

INVITE_KV.description: KV namespace used to store invitation codes, admin sessions, rate limit counters, and activity logs. Cloudflare will provision this automatically — no action required.

CANVA_INVITE_URL.description: Your full Canva Education class invite link (e.g. `https://www.canva.com/brand/join?token=...`). This is stored as an encrypted secret and is **never** exposed to end users — it is only used server-side for the redirect.

ADMIN_USERNAME.description: Username for the admin panel login page. Defaults to `admin` — change this to something less guessable for production deployments.

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the admin panel. Use a strong, unique password. This is stored as an encrypted secret by Cloudflare.

SESSION_SECRET.description: A 64-character random hex string used to sign admin session cookies. Generate one by running this in your browser console: `Array.from(crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(32))).map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2,'0')).join('')`
